service_account_id.description: The fully-qualified name of the service account to apply policy to.

role.description: The role that should be applied. Only one google_service_account_iam_binding can be used per role. Note that custom roles must be of the format [projects|organizations]/{parent-name}/roles/{role-name}.

member.description: Identities that will be granted the privilege in role. Valid values: allUsers, AllAuthenticatedUsers, user:{emailid}, serviceAccount:{emailid}, group:{emailid}, domain:{domain}

condition_expression.description: Textual representation of an expression in Common Expression Language syntax. Must also set Condition Title to create a condition.

condition_title.description: Title for the expression, i.e. a short string describing its purpose. Must also set Condition Expression to create a condition.

condition_description.description: An optional description of the expression. This is a longer text which describes the expression, e.g. when hovered over it in a UI.
